🐛 Bug Fixes: Resolved an issue where toast notifications failed to display.

📌 Improvements: Refined scrollbar styling for a cleaner UI.
Added official support for LynxHub v3.5.5

✨ New: Added the ability to edit cards directly from the action card using the new pen button.
Introduced environment variable support for executable actions.
Added import/export functionality for custom cards via file and clipboard operations.

⚡ Improvements: Migrated to LynxHub cards for better UI consistency across the app.
Optimized management window animations for smoother transitions and improved performance.

🐛 Bug Fixes: Fixed an issue where app pty processes were not properly cleaned up upon closing.

📌 Minor Changes: Replaced the tools page card icon with a cleaner, minimalist icon.
Removed the accent color from cards for a more streamlined look.
Refined overall styling and layout for a polished experience.

⚡ Improvements: Updated API to latest LynxHub API version.

🐛 Bug Fixes: Fixed changing title and description performance.

✨ New: Added URL detection by scanning terminal output for specific lines.
Added ability to edit existing commands in the actions list.
Added 'CD to Folder' action for quick directory navigation.

⚡ Improvements: Auto-extract directory path when adding scripts.
Improved script execution with proper interpreter detection for various file types (.py, .sh, .js, etc.).

🐛 Bug Fixes: Fixed command list getting corrupted after adding long commands.
Fixed issue where only one executable could run at a time.
Fixed action card deletion, restored after the app restarts.

📌 Minor Changes: Updated the size of action cards and removed the particle effect.
Updated the Tools page card design to match the new V3.3.0 style.
Switched to using image URLs instead of bundled icons.
